content: 1. Canonical API Response Layer - Create shared backend response shapes for properties, residents, providers, analytics
2. Route Guard and Fallback Pass - Unauthorized redirects, 404 pages, empty states, disabled actions
3. Auth Polish Pass - Role switcher clarity, failed login states, logout confirmation, session timeout
4. Property Manager Action Model - Define manager review/action/approval structure
5. Alex Journey Backbone Rebuild - Timeline, intervention history, communication, services, credits
6. Notification and Event Logging Layer - Internal event system for all actions
7. Global Settings Logic Pass - Risk thresholds, intervention rules, provider routing
8. Final Consistency Test Matrix - Structured QA across all roles
